title: VideoDedupServer
description: gRPC video deduplication server for the VideoDedup suite. Scans folders for visually duplicate videos and exposes results to the VideoDedup client.
description_synopsis: gRPC video deduplication server for VideoDedup
description_detail: This server scans storage for visually near-duplicate videos and serves match results to the VideoDedup desktop client over gRPC (HTTP/2 cleartext on TCP 51726 by default). It is meant to run under systemd. The package does not open host firewall ports; see /usr/share/doc/videodedupserver/README.firewall after install.
